title: Lead Instructional Designer at NASSCOM Foundation

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at NASSCOM Foundation
jsonLd.description:
NASSCOM Foundation invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About NASSCOM Foundation:
NASSCOM Foundation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NASSCOM Foundation!
